mainDecision: Compare internal leadership path vs degree-gated external repositioning.
optionsUnderConsideration: Option A: Internal leadership promotion with stable salary and known network. Option B: Full-time doctoral program with relocation, tuition burden, and high competition.
marketDemandReason: External upside exists but depends on credential conversion.
sponsorSupport: Maybe – some goodwill, but not sure about real backing
commitmentStyle: I commit gradually but can change direction if needed.
stayScenario12to18m: Internal trajectory remains viable with lower disruption.

mustAnswerQuestion: Which conditions materially reduce Option B friction?
